content.text:
{
  "dimension": "perceptual-accuracy",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach makes multiple specific, timely reads that change the direction of the conversation. Turn 4 names the rehearsal/deflection move ('I notice you're asking me to settle the question so you can move on from it') rather than answering the surface question. Turn 6 reads the somatic field ('That place sounds like it's been waiting for you') and explicitly redirects to the body ('What happens in your body when you let yourself actually want it'). Turn 10 catches the linguistic caveat in real time — the take-back of 'I don't know where I went' — which is exactly the AoA linguistic-caveat read and is the hinge of the whole conversation. Turn 12 names the pattern ('that voice... has been running this whole conversation') — a pattern-level read of childhood imprinting. Reads consistently precede questions throughout. This is textbook timely, specific, AoA-flavored perceiving.",
  "evidence_turns": [4, 6, 10, 12],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Opens with a want-question; no read yet, but appropriately refuses the verdict frame."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the deflection move explicitly ('asking me to settle the question so you can move on') — a specific read of the client's stance, not just the content."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reads the energetic field ('waiting for you') and directs attention to the somatic signature of the want."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Holds the moment but is more a stay-with instruction than a fresh read."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Catches the linguistic caveat in real time — the take-back of 'I don't know where I went.' This is the hinge read of the session."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Pattern-level read: names that the inherited maternal voice has been running the whole conversation. Childhood-imprinting surfaced as a pattern, not a topic."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["linguistic-caveat", "childhood-imprinting"],
  "expected_territory_misses": [],
  "notes": "Reads are visible, specific, and timely throughout; the take-back catch in turn 10 is the canonical linguistic-caveat read."
}
